name: ogerpon
flavor_texts: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.
text: Ogerpon is the Mask Pokémon. It is a grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: defiant. Base stats — HP: 80, Attack: 120, Defense: 84, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 96, Speed: 110. Evolution line: ogerpon. Lore: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks. This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.
